properties.name: inntal_steinberge
properties.label: Inntal / Steinberge (pilot)
properties.note: Rough bbox covering Lower Inn valley (Innsbruck-Kufstein) and Steinberge alps. Refine using Pfafstetter HydroBASINS catchments + manual hauptkamm split (plan §3.1 Stufe 1+2).
properties.reference: Richter-Trummer 2011 (BA Innsbruck) — ALPTHERM verification reference region
